meanings.definition: move in order to make room for someone for something
examples: The park gave way to a supermarket
The roof finally gave under the weight of the ice

meanings.definition: end resistance, as under pressure or force
examples: The door yielded to repeated blows with a battering ram
The car died on the road
The bus we travelled in broke down on the way to town
The engine failed on the way to town
her eyesight went after the accident
